articles.title: Reality TV star Joseph Duggar waives extradition, will face a child molestation charge in Florida
articles.description:
Joseph Duggar is charged with lewd and lascivious behavior on a child under 12 years old, according to an arrest affidavit.

The post Reality TV star Joseph Duggar waives extradition, will face a child molestation charge in Florida appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Joseph Duggar faces child molestation charges in Florida for lewd behavior on a child under 12.
Duggar waived extradition, indicating potential legal proceedings affecting his future.
Local residents may be concerned about child safety and the implications of celebrity legal issues.

articles.title: Hawaii suffers its worst flooding in 20 years and forecasters warn more rain is coming
articles.description:
Raging waters lifted homes and cars and prompted evacuation orders for 5,500 people north of Honolulu.

The post Hawaii suffers its worst flooding in 20 years and forecasters warn more rain is coming appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Hawaii faces its worst flooding in 20 years, affecting thousands of residents.
Evacuation orders issued for 5,500 people north of Honolulu due to rising waters.
Boston residents may see increased travel disruptions as recovery efforts unfold.

articles.title: What does it mean to have a partner?
articles.description:
A last-minute microwedding, nostalgia for slower communication, and a fresh conversation about the language people use for love.

The post What does it mean to have a partner? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Explore the rise of microweddings in Boston amid changing relationship dynamics.
Discusses communication styles in relationships, reflecting a shift in local dating culture.
Encourages Boston residents to rethink language and definitions surrounding partnerships.

articles.title: After loss and cancer, a Burlington runner keeps moving toward Boston
articles.description:
After losing his father to glioblastoma and later surviving testicular cancer himself, he’s running with Team MGH to honor both of their journeys.

The post After loss and cancer, a Burlington runner keeps moving toward Boston appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Burlington runner Adam Averback honors his father and cancer journey by running for Team MGH.
Averback survived testicular cancer after losing his father to glioblastoma.
His participation in the Boston Marathon raises awareness for cancer support in the community.

articles.title: Iran threatens tourism sites and US sends more Marines to Middle East as Trump hints at wind-down
articles.description:
Iran’s top military spokesperson warned that “parks, recreational areas and tourist destinations” worldwide will not be safe for the country's enemies.

The post Iran threatens tourism sites and US sends more Marines to Middle East as Trump hints at wind-down appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Iran threatens global tourist sites, raising safety concerns for Boston travelers.
US deploys additional Marines to the Middle East amid rising tensions.
Local tourism industry may face challenges due to increased security risks.

articles.title: New Patriots S Kevin Byard working out with rumored New England trade target A.J. Brown
articles.description:
Byard and Brown played on the Titans together under then-head coach Mike Vrabel for three seasons.

The post New Patriots S Kevin Byard working out with rumored New England trade target A.J. Brown appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Kevin Byard, new Patriots safety, workouts with A.J. Brown, a potential trade target.
Byard and Brown previously played together for three seasons under coach Mike Vrabel.
This connection could enhance team chemistry for the Patriots in the upcoming season.
